title: senna silvestris subsp. silvestris
intro: Senna silvestris subsp. silvestris, a plant species within the Fabaceae family, is commonly known as the wild senna. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and laxative effects, which make it effective in treating constipation and digestive issues. The health benefits of Senna silvestris subsp. silvestris include its ability to soothe irritable bowel syndrome, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Senna silvestris subsp. silvestris can be made into teas, capsules, or infusions, allowing for various methods of consumption and utilization of its medicinal properties.
